CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2022 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-01-2021 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-08-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Leave To File Faa
Off Calendar Apr-30-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. YOUNG W. CHOI, Esq. (Tel: 916-924-5109) of and for plaintiff State Compensation Insurance Fund;
Atty. DALE B. RATNER, Esq. of Bishop / Barry (Tel: 510-596-0888) for defendants Big Dog City Corporation dba Yellow Cab of San Francisco and C&J Leasing, Inc., and Bruce Michael Pachter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS CJ LEASING, INC., BRUCE PACHTER, AND BIG DOG CITY CORPORATION's Motion Of Leave To File First Amended Answer.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants' motion for leave to file an amended answer is granted. California courts liberally allow amended pleadings; '[i]n particular, liberality should be displayed in allowing amendments to answers." (Hulsey v. Koehler (1990) 218 Cal.App.3d 1150, 1159.) Defendants raised their desire to amend back in January and plaintiff delayed in responding.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
